chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1375 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13-01-2022 Mr. Muhammad Naseer Chachar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General <><><><><>....<><><><><> Pursuant to issuance of notice, comments have been filed on behalf of Respondents 6, 7 and 8. On perusal of the same, it appears that there is some dispute in respect of the land in question between the Petitioner and private Respondents 11 to 15. In that case, we cannot issue any directions for demarcation of the land as apparently the Petitioner has to seek appropriate civil remedy for resolution of the dispute between the Petitioner and the private Respondents. In view of such position, this Petition is dismissed as not maintainable, whereas, the Petitioner may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
